title: HR Coordinator
description: Unilever is seeking an HR Coordinator to support our talent management and employee experience operations across North America. You'll be the connective tissue between our teams and HR, ensuring smooth onboarding, benefits administration, and employee services. This fully remote position offers exposure to a global company while maintaining work-life balance.
responsibilities: Coordinate new employee onboarding, including documentation, orientation materials, and system setup
Process employee benefits enrollments and manage benefits-related inquiries and changes
Maintain and update HR databases and employee records in compliance with company policies
Schedule interviews, coordinate hiring logistics, and support the recruitment process
Support employee relations activities including recognition programs and employee engagement initiatives
Generate HR reports and assist with compensation analysis and payroll coordination

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field
skills: Knowledge of HR practices and employment law basics
Strong organizational and time management skills
Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information
certifications: PHR (Professional in Human Resources) or SHRM-CP certification (preferred within 12 months)

benefits: Competitive health, dental, vision, and wellness benefits
Professional development funding and tuition reimbursement
Employee discounts on Unilever brands and partner retailers
